text.title: Message Queue Reliability Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply mq-reliability end-to-end.

step.name: audit-current
step.action: Pull current settings for each queue.

step.name: define-targets
step.action: Pick numeric targets for retries + prefetch + lengths.

step.name: install-alerts
step.action: Wire alert rules with 5-min sustained threshold.
